hero.title: How a Dublin physio clinic cut admin time by 15 hours a week
hero.subtitle: Peak Physio Ballsbridge was spending 20 hours a week on appointment reminders, intake paperwork, and follow-up calls. We fixed it in 2 weeks.

stats.admin: 15 hrs saved per week on admin
stats.timeline: 2 weeks from first call to live

client.title: Peak Physio Ballsbridge
client.description: Peak Physio Ballsbridge is a 3-therapist clinic in Dublin dealing with complex sports injuries and post-surgical rehabilitation. Before launch, the clinic was managing patient intake via physical clipboards and appointment reminders via manual WhatsApp messages — a process that consumed roughly 15 hours of the clinic director's week.

problem.title: The problem
problem.p1: Peak Physio Ballsbridge's front desk was spending nearly 3 hours every morning on appointment reminders — calling patients one by one, leaving voicemails, and sending manual texts. On busy days, some patients never got reminded at all, leading to costly gaps in the schedule.
problem.p2: Intake was handled on paper forms that patients filled out on arrival. The therapist would then manually enter the relevant details into their notes system. If a form was illegible, they'd have to ask the patient to repeat information they'd already written down, wasting valuable treatment time.
problem.p3: There was no shared visibility across the team. If a therapist left a note that a patient needed a follow-up call in two weeks, it lived on a Post-It note. The admin team had no centralized way to track these tasks, meaning revenue-generating follow-ups were often missed.

solution.title: What we built
solution.intro: We built a web-based operations portal custom to Peak Performance's workflow. It took 11 days from kickoff to the team going live. No off-the-shelf software was used — everything was designed around how the clinic actually operates.

intake.title: Digital intake
intake.desc: Patients now receive an intake form link automatically when an appointment is booked. By the time they arrive, their details are already in the system. The therapist reviews the form on a tablet before walking into the session.

reminders.title: Reminder automation
reminders.desc: Every appointment triggers an automatic SMS and email reminder 24 hours and 2 hours beforehand. Patients can confirm or cancel with one tap. Cancellations immediately free the slot and notify the front desk.

tasks.title: Staff task board
tasks.desc: Therapists can leave follow-up tasks directly from a patient's record — 'call in 2 weeks', 'check in after surgery', 'send exercise sheet'. These appear in the admin task queue with due dates and patient context.

result.title: What changed

card1.label: time saved on admin
card1.sub: The morning reminder calls stopped entirely.

card3.label: from kickoff to live
card3.sub: The team was using it within 2 weeks.

result.quote: "The portal replaced a stack of spreadsheets and a lot of phone calls. The team picked it up in an afternoon. Our front desk finally has time to actually talk to patients."
result.author: Sarah, Owner — Peak Physio Ballsbridge

hero.title: Built by a software engineer who watched a clinic drown in admin.
hero.subtitle: Flownox started with one observation: clinics that are excellent at treating patients are often terrible at running the admin side — not because they're disorganised, but because no one ever built them the right tools.

story.title: How this started
story.p1: The first clinic we worked with was a physiotherapy practice in Dublin. They were running their bookings on one system, intake on paper, reminders by phone, and patient follow-ups on Post-It notes. The receptionist spent the first hour of every morning making calls that could have been automated in 5 minutes.
story.p2: We built them a portal. It took about two weeks. The morning reminder calls stopped. The intake forms went digital. The therapists stopped losing follow-up tasks. It wasn't revolutionary technology — it was just the right system, built for how they actually work.
story.p3: That's what Flownox does now. We build operations portals for physio and sports clinics that want to stop running their admin on workarounds.

founder.title: Who you're working with
founder.name: Antonio Moya — Founder & Software Engineer
founder.bio: Antonio is a software engineer based in Ireland. He built Flownox after seeing firsthand how much time clinic staff spend on tasks that should be automated. He handles everything personally: the discovery call, the build, the handover, and the ongoing support. When you work with Flownox, you work directly with Antonio — not a project manager or an account manager.
founder.line1: Based in Ireland. Serving clinics across Ireland and Europe.
founder.line2: All builds are custom. No templates, no off-the-shelf tools.

honest.title: A few things worth knowing before you get in touch
honest.paragraph: Flownox is a small, focused operation. We work with a limited number of clinics at a time — not because of capacity, but because we don't take on work we can't do properly. If you get in touch, you'll speak to Antonio directly. If the portal isn't right for your clinic, we'll tell you. If you want a quote for something different, we can discuss it — but our main offer is the portal described on this site.

finalCta.title: Want to work together?
finalCta.subtitle: Book a 20-minute call with Antonio. No sales process, no proposal deck. Just a conversation about whether we can help.

hero.title: The Clinic Operations Portal
hero.subtitle: A custom web portal built specifically for your clinic. Replaces spreadsheets, paper forms, phone reminders, and scattered tools — with one system your whole team actually uses.

included.title: Everything your clinic needs. Nothing it doesn't.

features.title: Patient intake forms
features.description: Digital forms sent to patients automatically before their first appointment. They fill it in on their phone. By the time they arrive, you already have their details, medical history, and consent.
features.whyItMatters: Your therapists walk into every first session prepared. No clipboard, no manual data entry, no chasing paperwork.

features.title: Live appointment dashboard
features.description: A clean, real-time view of today's bookings, upcoming sessions, and each patient's history. Filter by therapist, by date, by treatment type.
features.whyItMatters: Everyone on your team sees the same information. No more asking 'who has Mrs Murphy at 3pm?'

features.title: Internal task board
features.description: A lightweight internal task system so nothing falls through the cracks. Notes from sessions, follow-up reminders, admin tasks — all visible to the right people.
features.whyItMatters: When a therapist writes 'call patient after 2 weeks', it shows up as a task — not a sticky note that disappears.

features.title: Automated appointment reminders
features.description: SMS and email reminders sent automatically 24 hours and 2 hours before each appointment. Patients can confirm or cancel with one tap.
features.whyItMatters: No-show rates drop immediately. Your front desk stops spending 45 minutes every morning making reminder calls.

whatNot.title: What this is not
items: Not a generic SaaS subscription. This is custom-built for your clinic's actual workflow.
Not a 6-month agency project. You're live in 2 weeks or we refund the setup fee.
Not a tool your staff will need training to use. We build for non-technical people.
